name: lottie
description: Lottie animation sub-agent — generates, optimizes, and renders Lottie/Bodymovin JSON animations. Inherits from animation parent.

skills.name: generate-lottie
skills.description: Generates a Lottie animation JSON spec from a text description

parameters.description: string — what the animation should depict

skills.name: optimize-lottie
skills.description: Optimizes a Lottie JSON file — removes unused layers, minifies, reduces keyframes

skills.name: lottie-react-guide
skills.description: Generates React code to embed a Lottie animation using lottie-react or lottie-web
